name: io.tesseraai/mcp-server
description: MCP server exposing Tessera's LLM cost optimization layer as tools for tool-using agents (Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Cline, Continue, Goose, Zed). Returns savings decisions — anchored spend, drift detection, recommendation approval — not raw logs. v0.1 surface: six tools (five read + one mutate). Stdio transport at v0.1; Streamable HTTP queued.

env.name: TESSERA_API_KEY
env.description: API key in tk_live_* or tk_test_* format. Get one free at https://tesseraai.io/dev (60M tokens/month, no card).

env.name: TESSERA_UPSTREAM_API_BASE_URL
env.description: Override only for staging or local-dev testing.

tools.name: tessera_list_workloads
tools.summary: List mapped workloads with anchor cost and current mechanic stack.

tools.name: tessera_get_savings_report
tools.summary: Anchored spend vs actual + measured savings + performance fee accrual for a workload over 7d / 30d / mtd.

tools.name: tessera_get_recommendation_queue
tools.summary: Pending Optimize-tab recommendations with expected lift, confidence, and sample size.

tools.name: tessera_get_ledger_entries
tools.summary: Audit-immutable Monthly Reading rows — provider call, mechanic stack applied, savings classification, pricing-catalog snapshot.

tools.name: tessera_get_quality_snapshot
tools.summary: SLA floor, p50 / p95 quality scores, drift events, composition-cap status.

tools.name: tessera_approve_recommendation
tools.summary: Move a queued mechanic from 'suggested' to 'active' with an audit-trail entry. Only mutating tool in v0.1.
